ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data was updated */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the market sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market sector */,
  "parent_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent sector (for hierarchical sectors) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the market industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market sector */,
  "parent_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical industries) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_industries_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES market_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic region */,
  "parent_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region (for hierarchical regions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, risk manager) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object representing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user managing the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the portfolio was updated */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Current total value of the portfolio */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the portfolio value is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user using the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the trading strategy was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the trading strategy was updated */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* JSON object representing the parameters of the trading strategy */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading strategy (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtest_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtest result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy being backtested */,
  "backtest_date" TEXT /* Date of the backtest */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the backtest (e.g., profit, loss) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the backtest result was created */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the backtest */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the backtest */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the backtest */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* JSON object representing evaluation metrics (e.g., Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtest_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)
